---
name: Bug or Regression｜主 Issue
about: Record a defect or regression before implementation
title: '[Bug]: '
labels: 'bug'
assignees: ''

---

## Summary｜摘要
Describe the defect or regression.

## Problem Statement｜问题定义
Describe what is wrong and why it matters.

## Reproduction｜复现步骤
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior｜预期行为
Describe the expected result.

## Actual Behavior｜实际行为
Describe the observed result.

## Impact and Scope｜影响范围
- Affected pages, modules, or environments:
- Severity:

## Suspected Area｜疑似范围
List any likely components, files, or recent changes if known.

## Acceptance Criteria｜验收标准
-

## Planned Sub-issues｜计划拆分的子任务
- [ ] Root cause analysis
- [ ] Fix implementation
- [ ] Regression verification

## Additional Context｜补充信息
Add logs, screenshots, related issues, or other evidence here.
